title: Assistant Manager, Marketing
description:
The Role
The Assistant / Deputy Manager, Marketing will be supporting Parkway Cancer Centre (PCC) in identifying trends, engaging users and increasing brand awareness through unique and innovative marketing strategies and campaigns.

Responsibilities

  • Responsible with marketing of PCC services within countries of charge.
  • Develop marketing plans in conjunction with the individual country's trends and market demands within the allocated budget.
  • Deliver all marketing activity within the agreed budget.
  • Manage and achieve frequent, timely and positive media coverage (paid or unpaid) across all available medias.
  • Conduct market research and report market intelligence in order to identify market requirements for the countries of charge as well as new and potential markets.
  • Identify potential strategic partners and establish relationships and collaborations.
  • Engage and manage relationships with internal stakeholders, consultants, clinicians, and business heads, ensuring alignment of priorities.
  • Lead planning and execution of public seminars, roadshows, health talks, workshops, and community engagement events.
  • Other duties as assigned.

Requirements

  • Diploma / Degree
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in Marketing or Sales function, preferably from Healthcare industry
  • Able to manage and supervise a team
  • Has good interpersonal and communication skills

postedCompany.description:
Touching Lives, Transforming Care


We are IHH, one of the world’s largest healthcare networks, with 80 hospitals in 10 countries.


We believe that making a difference starts with empathy and putting our patients’ needs first to build lasting relationships based on trust.


From everyday care to the little acts that warm the heart, we always deliver our best with genuine compassion – one patient, one family, one touch at a time.


With our unique reach and scale, we strive to continuously raise the bar in healthcare across multiple geographies and create synergies throughout our network. We offer our patients a full spectrum of integrated healthcare services across our portfolio of trusted healthcare brands.


As we build on what we do well and share our strengths and resources globally, we are making healthcare better, faster, easier and more affordable for our patients.
postedCompany.name: PARKWAY HOSPITALS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
